title: Taoism Drunkard
overview: A Taoist priest is ordered to find a Cherry Boy to appease his temple's ancestors. The boy in question is a young man who lives with his grandmother, trying to protect a sacred writ from a bright red, snarling bad guy. And let's just say insanity follows!

trailers.title: "How can you drink at a time like this?"
"The day you take that document is the day that you die"
